assertions.title: Tapping a bounding box opens detail modal

steps.expected: App loads and shows policy selection or camera view
steps.observed: App loaded successfully, localStorage cleared for fresh state

steps.expected: Model loads within 3-5 seconds, detection begins
steps.observed: Model stuck in 'Loading AI Model...' state indefinitely

steps.expected: Mock detections render bounding boxes on canvas
steps.observed: Multiple injection attempts failed - React internals not accessible
net::ERR_FAILED errors when loading MediaPipe resources from CDN

evidence.consoleErrors: Multiple net::ERR_FAILED errors for MediaPipe CDN resources (mediapipe-models/object_detector/efficientdet_lite0)

assertions.issues: MediaPipe AI model failed to load from CDN, preventing detection loop from running. Without detections, no bounding boxes are rendered, making it impossible to test the tap-to-open-modal functionality.

frictions.description: MediaPipe model loading is unreliable in headless browser environment - requires network access to Google Cloud Storage CDN
React state injection via browser console is complex and unreliable - the app doesn't expose mock detection APIs for testing

blockers.description: MediaPipe object detection model (efficientdet_lite0) fails to load from CDN with net::ERR_FAILED errors. The model is required for the detection loop that renders bounding boxes.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Attempted: (1) waiting 25+ seconds for model load, (2) network interception to mock model response, (3) JavaScript injection to bypass model loading, (4) localStorage flags for mock mode. All failed.
blockers.recommendation: Add a mock detection mode to the app that can be enabled via localStorage or query parameter for automated testing. This would bypass the MediaPipe model and render predefined bounding boxes.

summary: Test blocked: MediaPipe AI model failed to load (net::ERR_FAILED). Attempted multiple non-disruptive fixes including network interception and JS injection. All attempts unsuccessful. The assertion VAL-OVERLAY-010 (tapping bounding box opens detail modal) cannot be verified without functioning bounding boxes. Recommendation: Add mock detection mode for automated testing.
